CONTENT: あなたには もう一人 娘さんがいましたよね?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You had another daughter.

CONTENT: エリクト・サマヤは 今 どこにいるんですか?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Where is Ericht Samaya now?

CONTENT: いるわよ。えっ?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: She's there.

CONTENT: スレッタのすぐそばに。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Right at Suletta's side.

CONTENT: データストームのその先で 私たちを待っている。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Nos espera al otro lado de la tormenta de datos.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Beyond the data storm... she's there waiting for us.

CONTENT: うっ! そんな...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: It can't be...

CONTENT: 人間が モビルスーツに...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: you turned a human into a mobile suit...

CONTENT: 世界を書き換えたいの。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I want to rewrite the world.

CONTENT: エリィが幸せになるために。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: So that Eri can be happy.

CONTENT: 最初は 目を疑ったわ。エリィの生体コードは　データストームと 完全に同調できていた。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Al principio no podía creerlo. El código biométrico de Eri estaba sincronizado con la tormenta de datos.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I couldn't believe my eyes at first. Eri's biometric code was completely synched with the data storm.

CONTENT: けれど 幼い体は　過酷な宇宙の環境に 耐えられなかった。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Aun así, su cuerpo infantil no podía soportar la dureza del espacio exterior.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Even so... her child's body couldn't endure the harshness of outer space.

CONTENT: 私は ルブリスを使って エリィの命をつなぐと決めたわ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Decidí usar el Lfrith para mantener viva a Eri.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I decided to use Lfrith to keep Eri alive.

CONTENT: エアリアルとしてね。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Alive as Aerial.

CONTENT: データストームの ネットワークを使って　生体コードを 転移したってことですか?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Usaste la red de la tormenta de datos para transferir su código biométrico?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You used the data storm's network to transfer her biometric code, is that it?

CONTENT: 今のエリィは パーメット粒子と同じよ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Eri ahora mismo no es más que partículas Permet.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Eri is nothing more than Permet particles now.

CONTENT: エアリアルという体がなければ 物理空間では崩壊してしまう。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Sin el Aerial como su cuerpo, se desintegraría en el espacio físico.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Without Aerial as her body, she'd disintegrate in physical space.

CONTENT: でも スコア8なら
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Pero con una puntuación Permet de ocho...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But with a Permet score of eight...

CONTENT: クワイエット・ゼロで　データストームの領域を 広げれば
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Si podemos ampliar la tormenta de datos usando Quiet Zero...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If we can expand the range of the data storm through Quiet Zero...

CONTENT: エリィは 自由に生きることができる!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Then Eri... can live in freedom!

CONTENT: 協力してくれる? あっ...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Won't you help me?

CONTENT: ベル。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Bel?

CONTENT: できません。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I can't.

CONTENT: あら どうして?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Oh? Why is that?

CONTENT: これは ヴァナディースの理念とは 違います。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Esos no son los principios del Instituto Vanadis.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: These aren't the principles of the Vanadis Institute.

CONTENT: 強化人士は造ったのに? はっ!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Ustedes no seguían la Teoría de la Expansión Neural
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But didn't you make enhanced humans?

CONTENT: データストーム耐性のある 人工中枢神経を使用する　拡張神経理論。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: y creaban humanos mejorados con un sistema nervioso central artificial?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Using an artificial central nervous system with resistance to the data storm. That's the Neural Expansion Theory.

CONTENT: カルド先生は 決して認めなかった。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: El doctor Cardo se negó a aceptarla.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Dr. Cardo refused to accept it.

CONTENT: やめて...発案者は 確か　あなただったわよね。やめて! うっ うぅ...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: No... -Y esa idea la concebiste tú, ¿no? -¡Detente!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Don't... The one who conceived the idea... was you, am I right?

CONTENT: それ以上は... お願い...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Say no more... Please.

CONTENT: 逃れられないのよ あなたも。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: There will be no escape... for you, either.

CONTENT: アスティカシア高等専門学園で 発生したテロ事件は
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: El atentado sufrido en la Escuela Tecnológica Asticassia
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The terrorist attack at the Asticassia School of Technology

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: resultó en el secuestro de Sarius Zenelli, de Grassley. Los responsables, Alba de Fold,
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: has now, with the kidnapping of Grassley's Sarius Zenelli... The group claiming responsibility, the Dawn of Fold,

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: también estaban involucrados en el accidente de la Planta Quetta.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: is also said to be involved in the recent accident at Plant Quetta...

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Vim Jeturk, el CEO de Jeturk, falleció.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Jeturk CEO Vim Jeturk has been reported dead.

CONTENT: 同グループ総裁 デリング・レンブラン氏も　被害を 受けていたという情報もあり...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Y según algunas fuentes, el presidente Delling Rembran está herido.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: According to some sources, the Group's President, Delling Rembran, is injured as well.

CONTENT: 「ベネリット」グループが 企業行政法による治安活動を　独断で行使したことで 地球では　反スペーシアン感情が拡大。暴動に発展したデモが多発。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Con el Benerit Group llevando a cabo operaciones de seguridad por su cuenta, el creciente sentimiento anti-Spacian desencadenó revueltas.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: With the Benerit Group carrying out security operations at its own discretion under business administrative laws, growing anti-Spacian sentiment on Earth has escalated many protests into riots.

CONTENT: 一連の行動に対する グループへの非難の声は大きく　早急な...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: El grupo fue criticado duramente por sus actos y se cree que...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The Group has been heavily criticized for its recent actions and a swift response-

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Parece que se filtraron nuestros asuntos confidenciales.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: It seems our confidential matters have been leaked.

CONTENT: サリウス・ゼネリの所在は?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Se sabe algo del paradero de Sarius Zenelli?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Any clue where Sarius Zenelli is?

CONTENT: CEOの映像メッセージが 一度だけ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Nada más que el mensaje por video que envió.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Nothing but the single video message he sent.

CONTENT: フロント管理社が 引き続き捜索中です。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The front management company is continuing the search.

CONTENT: カテドラルは 何をやってるんだ!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: What is Cathedra doing?

CONTENT: 二度も襲撃されて まだ 捕らえられないのか!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Aún no los atrapan luego de dos ataques?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: After two attacks, they still can't catch them?

CONTENT: あなたも オープンキャンパスにいたのではなくて?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Tú no estabas presente en el incidente de las puertas abiertas?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Weren't you also there during the Open Campus incident?

CONTENT: くっ! 強硬策が裏目に出たわね。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Esas políticas tan firmes no funcionaron.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: All these hardline policies have backfired.

CONTENT: 宇宙議会連合も 探りを入れてきている。

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The Space Assembly League is starting to dig around too.

CONTENT: このままでは...ええ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: At this rate... Yes.

CONTENT: 我々は 新しい総裁を 選ばなければならないわ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Habremos de elegir a un nuevo presidente.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: We'll have no choice but to elect a new president.

CONTENT: 予想どおりね。出るんでしょ? 総裁選。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Es como se predijo. Te presentarás, ¿verdad?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: It's just as we predicted. You'll run in the election, right?

CONTENT: 機会を逃すつもりはないよ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I don't intend to miss this chance.

CONTENT: ミオリネちゃんは デリング総裁の後を　引き継がないのかな?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Isn't Miss Miorine going to take over for President Delling?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: La sangre no basta para llevarte a la cima.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Blood alone isn't enough to put you at the top.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Veamos... Si tuviera el apoyo de una de las tres ramas,
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Let's see. If she had backing from one of the three branches,

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: she could- Shaddiq.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I won't try to be her partner anymore. I'm going to the head office. Everyone's waiting.

CONTENT: 「株式会社ガンダム」の 疑いは晴れたってわけ?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿La S. p. A. GUND-ARM está libre de sospecha?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: So GUND-ARM, Inc. has been cleared of suspicion?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I see. Too bad for you.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: We're going to choose a new president.

CONTENT: 喜べよ。これで もう　決闘ゲームの賞品に ならなくて済む。

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You should be happy. Now you won't be a trophy in the dueling game.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The front is currently under a state of emergency.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: In accordance with school emergency regulations,

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: los alumnos tienen restringidas ciertas actividades.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: all students are currently subject to activity restrictions.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: There are fewer students.

CONTENT: そりゃ あんなことがあったらさ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: No puedo culpar a los que se fueron.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Can't blame those who left.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Mis padres vendrán por mí la próxima semana.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: My parents are picking me up next week.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Aren't you taking time off school, Rouji?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If I leave too, no one can hold any duels.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Así que tienes sentido del deber.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: So you do have a sense of duty.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: It's almost the Princess's birthday, right?

CONTENT: いつまで ニカねえ 拘束されなきゃなんねぇんだよ!

CONTENT: スパナはダメです!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You can't take that wrench!

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Ya nos impusieron una suspensión. No causes más problemas.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: We're all suspended already. Don't cause any more trouble.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿No seguían investigando? -¡Ya hace cinco días! Solo sospechan de los Earthians, eso es todo.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Didn't they say they're still investigating? But it's been five days! They're always suspicious of us Earthians, that's all.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Yeah, but even so, why'd they have to confiscate Aerial and my own Demi too?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Suletta's putting up with it, isn't she?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You guys brought the Gundams that attacked us, didn't you?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Así que protegen a las brujas.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You're protecting your fellow witches.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Brujas? En nuestra empresa se dice eso.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The witches who made the Gundams took pilots' lives with their experiments.

CONTENT: わ... 私たちのガンダムは そんなんじゃ...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: O-Our Gundam isn't like that-

CONTENT: 奪ったろ ランブルリングで!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You took lives too! In the Rumble Ring!

CONTENT: ジュベジュは 大切なヤツだったんだ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Jubeju was... a precious friend to us!

CONTENT: なのに...ジュベジュを返せよ!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But you... Give us back Jubeju!

CONTENT: 人殺し! ゴン!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Murderers!

CONTENT: マルタン! マルタンさん!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Martin... Mr. Martin!

CONTENT: てめぇら やりやがったな!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You creeps are gonna pay for that!

CONTENT: やめなさい。あっ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Stop it, all of you!

CONTENT: ミオリネ... さん?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Ms... Miorine?

CONTENT: 暴行の現場　学園も むげにはできないと思うけど。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Dudo que la escuela ignore las pruebas de la agresión.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I don't think the school will ignore direct evidence of assault.

CONTENT: ありがとうございます あの... 手当てしてもらって。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Thank you very much... for treating my injuries.

CONTENT: ニカ・ナナウラ。ん?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Nika Nanaura.

CONTENT: 私たちの仲間にならないか?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Don't you want to join our group?

CONTENT: えっ? 君のことは見ていた。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: What? I've been watching you.

CONTENT: メカニックとしての技量 学内での振る舞い。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Tu habilidad como mecánica, tu comportamiento en el campus...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Your skill as a mechanic, and your behavior on campus...

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Si estás con nosotros, podrás seguir tus estudios donde sea.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If you're with us, you can continue your studies elsewhere.

CONTENT: 地球と宇宙の懸け橋になる夢だって かなえられるはずだ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Podrías cumplir tu sueño de ser el puente entre Tierra y espacio.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You could even achieve your dream of bridging Earth and Space.

CONTENT: 私 決めたんです。もう 被害者のふりしていられないって。

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I've made a decision. I shouldn't act like a victim anymore.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Aunque el fin lo justifique, no usaré todos los medios.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Ni por la Tierra? ¿Tú también eres una Earthian?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Even if it's for Earth's sake? Are you an Earthian too?

CONTENT: 「グラスレー」に拾われるまではね。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Lo era hasta que me acogió Grassley.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I was until Grassley took me in.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Los ideales no pueden cambiar la realidad.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Ideals alone can't change reality

CONTENT: 君も ここを出られない。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You can't leave here either.

CONTENT: 私は シャディクと共に かなえるよ
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Pero Shaddiq y yo lo haremos.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But Shaddiq and I will make it happen.

CONTENT: 地球と宇宙の懸け橋になる夢を。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: El sueño de ser el puente entre Tierra y espacio...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The dream of bridging Earth and Space...

CONTENT: 単刀直入に言います。

CONTENT: エアリアルを手に入れなさい。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Obtain the Aerial for us.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: And what about winning over Suletta Mercury?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: La campaña electoral está por comenzar.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The presidential race is beginning.

CONTENT: 決闘ゲームは ここまで。それに　ランブルリングでの 消極的な戦闘行為

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The dueling game is over. Plus... your lackadaisical fighting during the Rumble Ring

CONTENT: 私たちは失望しています。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: has left us rather disappointed.

CONTENT: 状況を観察していただけですよ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I was merely observing the situation.

CONTENT: エアリアルは 先の一件で　一時的に没収されています。

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If you want to live, carry out your mission at all costs.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: We'll be number one soon enough. That's the plan.

CONTENT: 随分と久しぶりな気がするな。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Es como si llevara fuera una eternidad.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: It feels like... I've been gone for ages.

CONTENT: ラウダ ペトラ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Lauda, Petra...

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Mr. Guel?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The Group has kept pressing him to give explanations, take responsibility...

CONTENT: あっ ごめんなさい。

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Your father...

CONTENT: ああ 知っている。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Yeah. I'm aware.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Lauda no tuvo tiempo ni para llorar.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Mr. Lauda didn't even have time to grieve.

CONTENT: ずっと 一人で頑張ってて。

CONTENT: だから...ペトラ
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: That's why... Petra.

CONTENT: ラウダを頼む。えっ?

CONTENT: グエル先輩!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Mr. Guel!

CONTENT: おかえりなさい。

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Nika Nanaura was taken by other parties disguised as front management employees.

CONTENT: ん? 「株式会社ガンダム」に　出入りできるパスを下さい。

CONTENT: うちの会社も調べるつもり?

CONTENT: 興味があるんです　あなたが買収した 「シン・セー開発公社」に。

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I'm curious about the Shin Sei Development Corporation you acquired.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If you inform me of what you find...

CONTENT: 直接 行くのか?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You're going directly?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The costs for their Gundam repair were excessive,

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: y se envió mucho equipo a la Planta Quetta.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: and a lot of equipment was sent to Plant Quetta...

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Es apropiado para una empresa bajo mínimos?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Is that appropriate for a bottom-ranked company?

CONTENT: グループとつながっている?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Is the Group behind this?

CONTENT: ふっ。上は 難癖つけてでも
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Even if it requires groundless accusations,

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: the higher-ups plan to forcibly intervene in the Benerit Group.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: What?!

CONTENT: それまで待ってて。けどさ...分かった。おおっ...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Wait until I hear back. But- Understood.

CONTENT: あーしらだけじゃ 何も分からなかった。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: We couldn't find out anything on our own.

CONTENT: だから その...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: So... you know...

CONTENT: ありがと。あっ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Thanks.

CONTENT: どういたしまして。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You're welcome.

CONTENT: それじゃ これ。あっ。えっ?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Meanwhile, here you are. Huh?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The company's suspended from doing business,

はい。ん?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Why, all of a sudden...

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: What should I have done instead? Huh? After my colleagues and research went up in flames,

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: acabé trabajando para la gente de Peil.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I had to take refuge on Peil's payroll.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But one day... GUND's ideals would lead to a better future-

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: No quieres morir por ti, pero mi futuro no te importa. -No, yo... -¡No me repliques!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You don't want to die yourself, but you don't give a damn about my future! You're wrong, I- Like hell I'm wrong!

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I'm going to report you to the higher-ups.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I did as you said

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Por lo que pasó en la planta...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: About what happened at the plant...

CONTENT: 怒られなきゃいけないのは私。えっ?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: No, deberías estar enojada tú conmigo.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: No, you should be mad at me. Huh?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You saved my life and my father's.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I should have thanked you.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: That Aerial and I did the right thing.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Yes! Run and gain one. Move forward and gain two!

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Because I fought without running away, I was able to protect you and all of Earth House!

CONTENT: なんで そんなふうに笑えるの? えっ?

CONTENT: 助けてくれたのは分かってる。

CONTENT: でも 人を

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Right thing or not, you shouldn't smile about it!

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Will you do anything your mom tells you to?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I'd be troubled... I guess...

CONTENT: でも...ん?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But...

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Pero si me lo dijera mi madre, lo abandonaría.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But if my mom told me to, I'd give up.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¡La S. p. A GUND-ARM no es una herramienta de guerra!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: GUND-ARM, Inc. isn't a tool of war!

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If your mother told you to, would you use Gundams to kill people?

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Yes.

CONTENT: お母さんが言うなら。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Si me lo dijera ella, sí.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If Mom told me to.

CONTENT: お母さんの言ったとおりにしたから 学校に行けました。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Pude venir a la escuela porque hice lo que me decía.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: It's because I did what Mom said, that I got to go to school.

CONTENT: だから お母さんは いつも正しいんです。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Así que sé que mi madre siempre tiene razón.

CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Prospera!

CONTENT: くっ! あんた スレッタをどうするつもり!?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: What are you planning to do with Suletta?

CONTENT: 素直で いい子でしょ? ふざけないで!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: She's a good little girl, isn't she? This isn't funny!

CONTENT: あの子は あんたに言われれば なんでもする。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¡Esa chica hará todo lo que le digas!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: That girl will do anything you tell her to!

CONTENT: これ以上 スレッタを 思いどおりにさせないから!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I won't let you have your way with her anymore!

CONTENT: それで? 今度は あなたが思いどおりにするの?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: ¿Y qué? ¿Ahora quieres ser tú la que la manipule?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: And what then? Do you want to have your way with her next?

CONTENT: お父様みたいに。操り人形にしてるのは　そっちでしょ! クソおやじは関係ない!　関係あるわよ。あなたのお父様は　私たち親子の仇だもの。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Como tu padre... ¡La estás usando como tu marioneta! -¡Mi padre no tiene relación! -Ya te digo yo que sí. Porque tu padre es el objetivo de la venganza de mi familia.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Just like your father... You're the one using her as a puppet! My lousy father has nothing to do with this! Oh, but I'm afraid he does. Because your father is the object of my family's vengeance.

CONTENT: あのラジャンって男 口は堅かったのね。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Parece que Rajan cerró bien la boca.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I guess that man Rajan kept his mouth shut.

CONTENT: 待って。どういう...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Wait a second... What do you-

CONTENT: そのとおりの意味よ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I meant exactly what I said.

CONTENT: 21年前の ヴァナディース事変で
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Durante el Incidente de Vanadis de hace 21 años,
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: During the Vanadis Incident 21 years ago,

CONTENT: 私は デリング・レンブランに　夫を 仲間を 恩師を奪われた。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Delling Rembran me privó de mi marido, mis compañeros... y mi mentora.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Delling Rembran deprived me of my husband, my colleagues... and my mentor.

CONTENT: あの男は 魔女狩りと称して 機関の人間を皆殺しにしたわ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: En nombre de la caza de brujas, ese tipo mató a la gente del Instituto.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: In the name of "witch-hunting," that man slaughtered everyone at the Institute.

CONTENT: 生き残ったのは 私たちだけ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: We're the only ones who survived.

CONTENT: うそ...あなた　スレッタを 「人殺し」と責めていたけど
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Es mentira... Acusaste a Suletta de ser una asesina,
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You're lying... You accused Suletta of being a murderer,

CONTENT: 自分も同じ所にいるのよ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: pero tú estás en la misma posición.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: but you're in the same position.

CONTENT: 人殺しの輪の中に。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: En la del ciclo de los asesinos...
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Inside the circle of murderers...

CONTENT: あなたにも聞いてほしいわ
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I want you to hear them too.

CONTENT: 殺された同胞たちの 悲鳴と叫びを。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Los chillidos y los gritos de mis compañeros.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: The screams and cries of my comrades...

CONTENT: 「復讐を果たせ。デリングを殺せ」と
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Venga nuestras muertes. Mata a Delling.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Avenge our deaths... Kill that man Delling...

CONTENT: 今も 私の耳元で ささやいている。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Me lo susurran al oído en este mismo instante.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: They're whispering it in my ear, even as we speak.

CONTENT: 復讐したければ 大人同士で 勝手に やって!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Si quieres venganza, ¿por qué no se matan los adultos?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: If you want revenge, why don't you adults kill each other?

CONTENT: でも スレッタを あんたの復讐に巻き込まないで!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Pero ¡deja a Suletta al margen de tu venganza!
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: But leave Suletta out of your vengeance!

CONTENT: けなげな花嫁様ね。じゃあ 協力してくれる?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: You're quite an admirable bride. Will you cooperate with me, then?

CONTENT: えっ? クワイエット・ゼロ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Huh? Quiet Zero...

CONTENT: このままでは 総裁が代わって 計画は潰されてしまう。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: A este paso habrá un presidente nuevo y el plan se desmoronará.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: At this rate, there'll be a new president, and our plan will be ruined.

CONTENT: だから ミオリネ・レンブラン
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: That's why, Miorine Rembran...

CONTENT: あなたが 次の総裁になりなさい。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: you must become the next president.

CONTENT: 私が?
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: Me?

CONTENT: 無理よ そんなの。できるわ。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Yo no podría... Obvio que puedes.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: I could never... You can do it.

CONTENT: だって あなたは デリング・レンブランの
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: Puesto que eres la hija de Delling Rembran
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: After all, you're Delling Rembran's

CONTENT: 血塗られた娘ですもの。
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_SPANISH: con las manos manchadas de sangre.
CONTENT_TRANSLATION_ENGLISH: blood-stained daughter.
